total_solar_used_in_house_value.name: Total solar used in house value

data_description.startup_backfill_hours: How many hours of historical data to import automatically on startup. Set to 0 to disable automatic startup backfill.
data_description.tariff_preset: Optional dated tariff preset. Presets currently apply transfer-side defaults and tariff mode when saved. Bundled snapshots currently cover Caruna Espoo and Caruna Oy transfer tariffs.
data_description.tariff_mode: Select whether import-side margins and transfer fees use spot-only, flat, day/night, or seasonal day/night pricing.
data_description.import_retailer_margin: Retailer margin added to spot price for imports in c/kWh. Enter the household-billing gross value you want reflected in the totals.
data_description.export_retailer_adjustment: Adjustment applied to spot price for exports in c/kWh. Negative values reduce export compensation.
data_description.grid_import_transfer_fee: Flat grid transfer fee for imports in c/kWh. Enter the household-billing gross value if applicable.
data_description.grid_export_transfer_fee: Grid transfer fee for exports in c/kWh.
data_description.electricity_tax_fee: Fixed electricity tax applied to imports in c/kWh. Enter the household-billing gross value if applicable.
data_description.day_import_retailer_margin: Daytime retailer margin for imports in c/kWh when tariff mode is day/night, or the winter daytime margin when tariff mode is seasonal day/night. Enter the household-billing gross value you want reflected in the totals.
data_description.night_import_retailer_margin: Nighttime retailer margin for imports in c/kWh when tariff mode is day/night, or the other-times margin when tariff mode is seasonal day/night. Enter the household-billing gross value you want reflected in the totals.
data_description.day_grid_import_transfer_fee: Daytime grid transfer fee for imports in c/kWh when tariff mode is day/night, or the winter daytime fee when tariff mode is seasonal day/night. Enter the household-billing gross value if applicable.
data_description.night_grid_import_transfer_fee: Nighttime grid transfer fee for imports in c/kWh when tariff mode is day/night, or the other-times fee when tariff mode is seasonal day/night. Enter the household-billing gross value if applicable.
data_description.power_fee_rule: Select how the estimated monthly power fee is calculated.
data_description.power_fee_rate: Monthly power fee rate in EUR per qualifying kW. Enter the household-billing gross value if applicable.
data_description.battery_expected_usable_capacity_kwh: Configured usable battery capacity in kWh used as the baseline for heuristic health, cycle, and backup-runtime estimates. Set to 0 to disable capacity-based analytics.
